title: microchloa indica
intro: Microchloa indica, also known as Indian grass or Chrysopogon, is a tropical grass species native to India. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Microchloa indica include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and providing relief from digestive problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions in Ayurvedic medicine.
